*|Force: whether it is forced to be present

Name.ItemClassified: Prints the classified form of an item name.
Name.ItemAcc: Prints the accusative form of an item name.
Name.ItemAccClassified: Prints the accusative, classified form of an item name.
Name.TrainerNameField: Displays the speaker's name above the message window.

Grm.ForceSingular: Forces the next variable printed to be in the singular form.
Grm.ForcePlural: Forces the next variable printed to be in the plural form.
Grm.ForceMasculine: Forces the next variable printed to be in the masculine form.
Grm.ForceInitialCap: Forces the next variable printed to have the first letter capitalized.

StrSel.Gen: Prints different text depending on gender.
StrSel.Qty: Prints different text depending on number.
StrSel.GenQty: Prints different text depending on gender and number.
StrSel.GenQtyDE: Prints different text depending on gender and number in German.
StrSel.Elision: Prints different text depending on elision in French.
StrSel.Elision|Y: with elision (before a vowel or an unaspirated h)
StrSel.QtyZero: Prints different text depending on number, including zero.
StrSel.DateIT: Prints different text depending on the date in Italian.
StrSel.Version: Prints different text depending on the game version.

EN.DefArt: Prints the appropriate English definite article.
EN.DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate English definite article, capitalized.
EN.IndArt: Prints the appropriate English indefinite article.
EN.IndArtCap: Prints the appropriate English indefinite article, capitalized.

FR.DefArt: Prints the appropriate French definite article.
FR.DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate French definite article, capitalized.
FR.IndArt: Prints the appropriate French indefinite article.
FR.IndArtCap: Prints the appropriate French indefinite article, capitalized.
FR.A_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "à" combined with the definite article.
FR.A_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "à" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
FR.De_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "de" combined with the definite article.
FR.De_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "de" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
FR.De: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "de".
FR.DeCap: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "de", capitalized.
FR.Que: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "que".
FR.QueCap: Prints the appropriate form of the French preposition "que", capitalized.

IT.DefArt: Prints the appropriate Italian definite article.
IT.DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate Italian definite article, capitalized.
IT.IndArt: Prints the appropriate Italian indefinite article.
IT.IndArtCap: Prints the appropriate Italian indefinite article, capitalized.
IT.Di_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "di" combined with the definite article.
IT.Di_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "di" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
IT.Su_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "su" combined with the definite article.
IT.Su_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "su" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
IT.A_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "a" combined with the definite article.
IT.A_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "a" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
IT.In_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "in" combined with the definite article.
IT.In_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "in" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
IT.Ed: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian conjunction "e".
IT.EdCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian conjunction "e", capitalized.
IT.Ad: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "a".
IT.AdCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Italian preposition "a", capitalized.

DE.DefArtNom: Prints the appropriate German definite article in the nominative case.
DE.DefArtNomCap: Prints the appropriate German definite article in the nominative case, capitalized.
DE.IndArtNom: Prints the appropriate German indefinite article in the nominative case.
DE.IndArtNomCap: Prints the appropriate German indefinite article in the nominative case, capitalized.
DE.DefArtAcc: Prints the appropriate German definite article in the accusative case.
DE.DefArtAccCap: Prints the appropriate German definite article in the accusative case, capitalized.
DE.IndArtAcc: Prints the appropriate German indefinite article in the accusative case.
DE.IndArtAccCap: Prints the appropriate German indefinite article in the accusative case, capitalized.

ES.DefArt: Prints the appropriate Spanish definite article.
ES.DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate Spanish definite article, capitalized.
ES.IndArt: Prints the appropriate Spanish indefinite article.
ES.IndArtCap: Prints the appropriate Spanish indefinite article, capitalized.
ES.De_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "de" combined with the definite article.
ES.De_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "de" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
ES.A_DefArt: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "a" combined with the definite article.
ES.A_DefArtCap: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "a" combined with the definite article, capitalized.
ES.DefArt_TrTypeAndName: Prints the appropriate Spanish definite article for a Trainer type and name.
ES.DefArtCap_TrTypeAndName: Prints the appropriate Spanish definite article for a Trainer type and name, capitalized.
ES.A_DefArt_TrTypeAndName: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "a" combined with the definite article.
ES.De_DefArt_TrTypeAndName: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish preposition "de" combined with the definite article.
ES.y/e: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish conjunction "y".
ES.Y/E: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish conjunction "y", capitalized.
ES.o/u: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish conjunction "o".
ES.O/U: Prints the appropriate form of the Spanish conjunction "o", capitalized.

Ctrl1.Color: Sets the color of the text to the specified color.
Ctrl1.ColorReset: Resets the color of the text.
Ctrl1.xcenter: Centers the following line of text.
Ctrl1.xright: Aligns the following line of text to the right.
Ctrl1.xadd: Changes the horizontal position of the caret.
Ctrl1.xset: Sets the horizontal position of the caret.

Ctrl2.LineFeed: Prompts the player to press a button to scroll the dialogue up one line before continuing.
Ctrl2.PageClear: Prompts the player to press a button to clear the dialogue box before continuing.
Ctrl2.WaitOne: Wait for a period of time before continuing.
Ctrl2.CallBackOne: Wait for a callback to finish before continuing.

System.Color: Sets the color of the text to the specified color.
System.Ruby: Sets the color of the text to the specified color.

Other.[COMP]: Marks text compressed using 9 bits per character instead of 16 bits per character.
Other.[NULL]: Placeholder for a line not present in this version of the game.
